utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Since the format asks for services with costs, this item is not fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides both monthly and annual totals—fully specified.
